value.value: @if(equals(activity('Get_File_Metadata').output.size, 0), 'File is empty', if(and(greater(length(item().name), 10), endsWith(toLower(item().name), '.csv')), concat('Schema invalid: expected ', string(pipeline().parameters.p_expected_column_count), ' columns but found ', string(activity('Get_File_Metadata').output.columnCount)), 'Invalid filename format'))

source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT folder_path, expected_column_count, expected_file_extension FROM dbo.table_config WHERE is_active = 1

body.value: @concat('{"title": "ADF Pipeline Failure", "text": "Bronze pipeline failed for folder: ', item().folder_path, '. Pipeline: ', pipeline().Pipeline, '. RunId: ', pipeline().RunId, '. Time: ', utcNow(), '"}')
@concat('{"title": "ADF Pipeline Failure", "text": "Bronze ingestion pipeline failed. Pipeline: ', pipeline().Pipeline, '. RunId: ', pipeline().RunId, '. Time: ', utcNow(), '"}')
